% ============================================================================
%  MOJAVE V2 CELL CARD  --  TEMPLATE ENGINE (single Saltelli cell)
%  ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
%  Do NOT edit this file for a normal run. Put values in runcard-config.tex.
%
%  Build:   pdflatex runcard-v2-cell.tex   (two passes)
% ============================================================================
\documentclass[10pt]{article}

\usepackage[a4paper,margin=20mm,headheight=14pt]{geometry}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\IfFileExists{lmodern.sty}{%
  \usepackage{lmodern}%
  \IfFileExists{microtype.sty}{\usepackage{microtype}}{}%
}{}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage[hidelinks]{hyperref}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------- palette ----
\definecolor{rcink}{HTML}{1A1A1A}
\definecolor{rcaccent}{HTML}{B3541E}
\definecolor{rcrule}{HTML}{C9C2B6}
\definecolor{rcmute}{HTML}{6B6B6B}
\color{rcink}

% ============================================================================
%  PARAMETER STORE
% ============================================================================
\makeatletter
\newcommand{\rcset}[2]{\expandafter\def\csname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname{#2}}
\newcommand{\rc}[1]{%
  \ifcsname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname
    \expandafter\let\expandafter\rc@cur\csname rc@@\detokenize{#1}\endcsname
    \ifx\rc@cur\@empty\textcolor{rcmute}{\textemdash}%
    \else\rc@cur\fi
  \else\textcolor{rcmute}{\textemdash}\fi}

% --------------------------------------------------------- section styling ----
\titleformat{\section}{\normalfont\large\bfseries\color{rcink}}{}{0pt}%
  {\rule[-3pt]{0pt}{14pt}}[{\color{rcrule}\titlerule[1pt]}]
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{12pt}{6pt}
\setlist{nosep,leftmargin=1.4em}
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.28}

\newenvironment{rcfacts}{\par\smallskip}{\par}
\newcommand{\fact}[2]{%
  \noindent
  \begin{minipage}[t]{0.25\linewidth}\raggedright\strut
    \bfseries\color{rcmute}#1\end{minipage}%
  \hfill
  \begin{minipage}[t]{0.71\linewidth}\raggedright\strut #2\end{minipage}%
  \par\smallskip}

\newcommand{\stat}[2]{%
  \begin{tabular}[t]{@{}l@{}}%
  {\footnotesize\color{rcmute}#1}\\[1pt]{\large #2}%
  \end{tabular}}

% ---------------------------------------------------- header / footer ----
\pagestyle{fancy}\fancyhf{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}
\lhead{\footnotesize\color{rcmute}MOJAVE V2 CELL CARD}
\rhead{\footnotesize\color{rcmute}\texttt{\rc{run.id}}}
\cfoot{\footnotesize\color{rcmute}\thepage}
\makeatother

% ============================================================================
\input{runcard-config.tex}

\begin{document}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------- TITLE ----
\begin{center}
  {\Huge\bfseries Mojave Cell Card}\\[4pt]
  {\color{rcmute}\small Saltelli Cell \rc{cell.id} --- \rc{benchmark.name}}
\end{center}
\vspace{4pt}
{\color{rcrule}\hrule height 1pt}
\vspace{6pt}
\noindent
\stat{CELL}{\texttt{\rc{cell.id}}}\hfill
\stat{SALTELLI IDX}{\rc{cell.saltelli.idx}}\hfill
\stat{ACCURACY}{\rc{cell.acc}}\hfill
\stat{N ITEMS}{\rc{cell.n.items}}
\vspace{4pt}
{\color{rcrule}\hrule height 1pt}

% --------------------------------------------------------------- HEADER ----
\section{Header}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Run ID}{\texttt{\rc{run.id}}}
\fact{Parent run}{\texttt{\rc{parent.run.id}}}
\fact{Date issued}{\rc{date.issued}}
\fact{Benchmark}{\rc{benchmark.name} \,\textbar\, \rc{benchmark.version}}
\fact{Model}{\rc{model.name} \quad \textcolor{rcmute}{quant:} \rc{model.quant}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ------------------------------------------------- PERTURBATION CONFIG ----
\section{Perturbation Configuration}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{prompt\_template}{\rc{axis.prompt_template}}
\fact{system\_prompt}{\rc{axis.system_prompt}}
\fact{decoding}{\rc{axis.decoding}}
\fact{choice\_order}{\rc{axis.choice_order}}
\fact{quantization}{\rc{axis.quantization}}
\fact{n\_shot\_frac}{\rc{axis.n_shot_frac}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ------------------------------------------------------- RESULTS ----
\section{Results}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Items scored}{\rc{cell.n.items}}
\fact{Correct (rescore)}{\rc{cell.correct}}
\fact{Accuracy}{\rc{cell.acc}}
\fact{vs.\ overall mean}{\rc{cell.vs.overall}}
\end{rcfacts}

% ------------------------------------------------------- AUDIT TRAIL ----
\section{Audit Trail}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Chain tip}{\rc{audit.chain.tip}}
\fact{Chain seq}{\rc{audit.chain.seq}}
\end{rcfacts}

% -------------------------------------------------- DATA REFERENCE ----
\section{Data Reference}
\begin{rcfacts}
\fact{Companion file}{\rc{companion.file}}
\fact{Hash}{\rc{companion.hash}}
\end{rcfacts}

\end{document}
